title: NOAA Satellites
description: A NOAA source card about satellite observations, weather forecasting, climate monitoring, and Earth data.
license: U.S. Government Work / item-level rights vary

pages.text: NOAA satellite resources show how observations from space support weather forecasts, storm tracking, climate monitoring, ocean data, and hazard response.
Use this source for data-literacy lessons where students ask how instruments collect evidence that humans cannot see directly from the ground.
NOAA materials are generally U.S. government work, but resource collections may link to partners or offsite materials. Check item-level rights before mirroring linked resources.
